highlights.text: For tomorrow the bull case is bulls can keep it going… the next leg up would target 5893, 5918, then 5928-31 .” Yesterday, we got to 5918.
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is that a relief bounce leg began on Monday by testing megaphone support, and is underway.
My newsletter yesterday was entitled: “Is Buy The Dip Temporarily Back In SPX” and for today, the answer was certainly yes.
Recall that all short squeezes are caused by the flush and recovery (failed breakdown) of a major previous support shelf.

It was a Back-Test Long at 5845-50 (as readers know), that got me long into CPI today, writing at 4pm yesterday: “I am still holding my 10% long runner from the 5848-50 long setup around noon today, discussed above, and will let this work.

post_title: The Rally Is Underway In SPX, But Now The Hard Part. Can It Sustain? Jan 16 Plan
